questions.q: On May 4, 2026, which major video game retail chain made a surprise $55.5 billion unsolicited takeover offer for the e-commerce giant eBay?

options: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
questions.correctText: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
